title: Prohibit Misplaced Projection Adapter Calls
forbids: map projection adapter calls outside their owning projection steps, physics-stage engine projection reads, or row-major odd-r tile callsites
why: Projection engine calls are structural source authority when the allowed callsites are exact recipe step files.
remediate: Move projection adapter calls to their owning map projection step or consume authored artifacts upstream.
message: Projection adapter call crossed its owning step boundary.
